game: Atelier Ryza: Ever Darkness & the Secret Hideout
title: Complete Walkthrough
author: GameFAQs Community
attribution: This walkthrough was adapted from the GameFAQs community guide for Atelier Ryza: Ever Darkness & the Secret Hideout. All credit for the original content goes to the GameFAQs community and guide contributors.

sections.title: Prologue: Life on Kurken Island
sections.content:
# Prologue: Life on Kurken Island

Atelier Ryza begins on the quiet Kurken Island in the Ashra-am Baird Kingdom. You play as Reisalin "Ryza" Stout, a farmer's daughter yearning for adventure beyond the island's shores. The prologue introduces you to the core gameplay systems, your hometown of Rasenboden Village, and your childhood friends Lent Marslink and Tao Mongarten.

## Opening & Rasenboden Village

<!-- checkpoint: game-start | Game Start -->

After the opening cinematic, you gain control of Ryza in her bedroom. Head outside to meet with Lent and Tao at the designated meeting spot (marked on your map).

**NPCs to talk to:**
- **Ryza's Mother** — triggers opening dialogue about farm work
- **Ryza's Father (Karl Stout)** — at the farm fields
- **Moritz Brunnen (Village Elder)** — near the village center, opposes the youth's adventuring

**Key Tutorial Concepts:**
- Movement and camera controls
- Map navigation (press the touchpad/menu button)
- Talking to NPCs and progressing events

### Meeting at the Hideout Cliff

Head to the cliff overlooking the sea where Lent and Tao wait. After the cutscene establishing the trio's desire for adventure, you'll be tasked with exploring the nearby Windswept Plains.

## Windswept Plains — First Exploration

<!-- checkpoint: first-exploration | First Exploration Complete -->

This is your first taste of field exploration. The game teaches you:

**Gathering:** Walk up to sparkling points and press the gather button. Different gather points yield different materials (plants, minerals, etc.). At this stage you can only gather by hand.

**Combat Basics:**
- Encounters are visible on the field — run into enemies to start battle
- **Normal Attack** — basic combo hits, builds AP (Action Points)
- **Skills** — spend AP on character skills (Ryza's Flame Rush, etc.)
- **Tactics Level** — the party-wide gauge that rises as you attack; higher levels unlock stronger follow-up actions from AI allies
- **Items** — Ryza can use synthesized items in battle (not available yet)
- **Order System** — party members will request specific actions; fulfill them to build Quick Actions and combos

**Enemies here:**
- Puni (slime creatures) — very weak, good for learning
- Small insects — slightly more aggressive

**Gathering Points:**
- Herbs, flowers, small rocks — collect everything you see
- Quantity matters: many recipes need multiples of basic materials

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Adventure Begins** — Visited the mainland for the first time. This triggers after completing the prologue and crossing to Boden District in the next chapter.

After gathering a few materials and fighting some monsters, return to the meeting spot. A cutscene will trigger leading into the next chapter.

> 📝 **TIP:** Explore every corner of the Windswept Plains. There are no missable items here, but gathering lots of materials early gives you more options when alchemy unlocks.

## Encountering the Alchemists

<!-- checkpoint: meet-empel | Meet Empel and Lila -->

Back in the village, events lead to an encounter with two travelers: **Empel Vollmer** (an alchemist) and **Lila Decyrus** (a warrior). This sets the main plot in motion — Empel agrees to teach Ryza alchemy.

> This is a pivotal story moment. The game's main narrative revolves around Ryza learning alchemy and the group uncovering the island's secrets.

After the cutscenes, the Prologue ends and Chapter 1 begins.

steps.text: Leave Ryza's house and meet Lent and Tao at the cliff overlook.
Head to the Windswept Plains and gather materials (herbs, flowers, rocks).
steps.note: Collect everything — you'll need lots of basic materials once alchemy unlocks.

steps.text: Defeat the Puni and insect enemies to complete the combat tutorial.
Return to the village after gathering to trigger the story cutscene.
Watch the cutscene introducing Empel and Lila.
steps.note: Empel becomes your alchemy teacher. Lila is a powerful warrior who joins the party later.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: The First Step** — Write a record of one exploration. Exploration records are automatically generated as you complete field areas.

sections.title: Chapter 1: Learning Alchemy
sections.content:
# Chapter 1: Learning Alchemy

With Empel as her teacher, Ryza begins learning the fundamentals of alchemy. This chapter introduces the synthesis system, gathering tool crafting, and sends you to the mainland for the first time.

## Alchemy Tutorial — Your First Synthesis

<!-- checkpoint: first-synthesis | First Synthesis Complete -->

Empel teaches you alchemy at Ryza's home (which becomes your temporary atelier). The synthesis system in Atelier Ryza uses a **Skill Tree** mechanic:

**Synthesis Basics:**
- Select a recipe from the Recipe menu
- Each recipe has a **Material Loop** — a tree of nodes requiring specific element types
- Add materials to nodes; better quality/traits = better results
- Filling nodes unlocks branches → better traits, higher quality, additional effects
- **Element Values** matter: Fire, Ice, Lightning, Wind — matching required elements fills the node meter

**Your first recipe:** Craft a basic healing item (usually a Neutralizer or Grass Bean).

> 🏆 **Achievement: Alchemic Talent** — Synthesized for the first time. Unmissable — triggers after your first successful synthesis.

**Key Alchemy Tips for the Entire Game:**
- Always synthesize with the highest quality materials available
- Traits stack and transfer — plan ahead for endgame items
- Rebuild items frequently as you get better materials
- The recipe tree expands massively — prioritize gathering tool and combat item recipes
- **Gems** are critical for item rebuilding later; save interesting trait combinations

## Crafting the Reaper's Scythe (Gathering Tool)

<!-- checkpoint: scythe-crafted | Reaper's Scythe Crafted -->

Empel's first real assignment: create the **Reaper's Scythe**, a gathering tool that lets you harvest plants more effectively.

**Recipe Requirements:**
- Gathered plant materials
- Basic ore/mineral
- Specific element requirements on the material loop

With the Scythe equipped, you can now:
- Cut tall grass and plants in the field (new gathering points become accessible)
- Gather different materials from the same points (e.g., fiber, wood)

> 🏆 **Achievement: Find the Kurken Fruit!** — Created the Reaper's Scythe. Unmissable story progression.

## The Mainland — Boden District

<!-- checkpoint: reach-mainland | Reach the Mainland -->

With the Scythe in hand, the group decides to sneak off the island to explore the mainland. After a boat scene, you arrive in the **Boden District** — a vast forest area with much tougher enemies.

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Adventure Begins** — Visited the mainland for the first time. Triggers automatically.

**New enemies in Boden District:**
- Forest Wolves — aggressive, can chain attacks
- Large insects — poison attacks
- Rock Punis — high defense

**Key Gathering Materials (Boden District):**
- **Beehive** — needed for multiple recipes
- **Eiche Wood** — for tool recipes
- **Stench Gas** — from specific plants (using Scythe)
- **Red Supplement** and other alchemy staples

**Explore thoroughly:** Each sub-area of Boden has unique materials. Visit:
- Maple Delta
- Fallen Tree Bridge (requires Axe later)
- The Fairy Forest
- Monster-infested hollow

### First Dangerous Encounter

In the Boden District, you'll encounter a powerful monster (the "strange beast") that is far above your current level. This is a scripted event — you're not expected to defeat it.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Creeping Shadows** — Witnessed the rise of a strange beast. Unmissable story event.

## Meeting Klaudia

<!-- checkpoint: meet-klaudia | Meet Klaudia -->

During your exploration of the mainland, you encounter **Klaudia Valentz**, the daughter of a traveling merchant. She becomes interested in the group's adventure and joins the party.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Klaudia's Curiosity** — Attended a tea party with Ryza and Klaudia. This triggers during Klaudia's introduction events.

**Klaudia's combat role:**
- Balanced attacker with wind-element skills
- Good speed stat
- Provides support in Orders

After Klaudia joins, you gain access to more story events and eventually unlock the path back to Kurken Island with new objectives.

steps.text: Complete Empel's alchemy tutorial by synthesizing your first item.
🏆 **Achievement: Alchemic Talent** — Synthesized for the first time.
Gather the required materials and synthesize the **Reaper's Scythe**.
steps.note: Check the recipe tree for exact material/element requirements.

steps.text: Equip the Scythe in your gathering tools and harvest plants in the field with it.
Follow the story events to travel to the mainland (Boden District).
Explore all areas of Boden District: Maple Delta, Fairy Forest, and surrounding paths. Gather new materials.
steps.note: Beehive, Eiche Wood, and Stench Gas are important early finds.

steps.text: Encounter the powerful beast in the mainland forest (scripted story event — you don't need to win).
Meet Klaudia during the mainland exploration and watch her introduction events.
Gather as many different materials as possible on the mainland. Having a variety of high-element materials makes synthesis much easier going forward.

sections.title: Chapter 2: Building the Secret Hideout
sections.content:
# Chapter 2: Building the Secret Hideout

Returning to Kurken Island, the group decides they need a proper base of operations away from prying village eyes. This chapter focuses on building the Secret Hideout — the central hub that will serve as Ryza's atelier for the rest of the game.

## Finding the Old Barn

<!-- checkpoint: find-hideout-location | Find the Hideout Location -->

The story directs you to an old abandoned barn on the outskirts of the village. After some events and convincing (including a dramatic scene where the village adults catch you sneaking around), you decide to turn this barn into your secret hideout.

**Tasks to complete:**
- Gather wood and construction materials
- Synthesize specific items Empel requests (Neutralizers, building materials)
- Complete dialogue events with all party members

## Building the Hideout

<!-- checkpoint: hideout-built | Secret Hideout Complete -->

Once you've gathered the required items, a montage/cutscene plays showing the group renovating the barn into a proper atelier.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Built a Hideaway** — Built a secret hideout for everyone. Unmissable story achievement.

**The Secret Hideout features:**
- **Alchemy Cauldron** — your primary synthesis station
- **Storage Container** — holds your materials and items (auto-deposited from gathering)
- **Bulletin Board** — displays available requests from villagers
- **Diary/Journal** — save point and story recap

> The hideout gains additional features over time (Power Reactor, Gathering Synthesizer, Multiplicauldron) as you progress through the story and complete specific recipes.

## Crafting the Woodcutter's Axe

<!-- checkpoint: axe-crafted | Woodcutter's Axe Crafted -->

With a proper atelier established, your next goal is crafting the **Woodcutter's Axe** — a gathering tool for chopping trees and collecting lumber.

**Recipe Notes:**
- Requires metal ingots (synthesized from ore)
- Requires wood and binding materials
- Higher quality = more effective gathering

> 🏆 **Achievement: I'm a Lumberjack!** — Created the Woodcutter's Axe. Unmissable story progression.

**With the Axe you can:**
- Chop down small trees for lumber
- Break wooden barriers blocking new paths
- Access new gathering points in previously visited areas

> 📝 **TIP:** Return to Boden District and Windswept Plains with your new tools. Previously inaccessible gathering points are now available and yield important materials.

## Crafting the Fishing Rod

<!-- checkpoint: fishing-rod-crafted | Fishing Rod Crafted -->

Shortly after the Axe, you unlock the recipe for the **Fishing Rod** — used at designated fishing spots (marked with a fish icon on the map).

> 🏆 **Achievement: Fishing Master** — Created the Fishing Rod. Unmissable.

**Fishing Mechanics:**
- Approach a fishing spot and use the rod
- Timing-based mini-game: press the button when the indicator is in the sweet spot
- Different spots have different fish; some fish require specific bait (synthesized items)
- Fish are used in recipes, requests, and some are needed for exploration records

## Crafting the Hammer

<!-- checkpoint: hammer-crafted | Hammer Crafted -->

The **Hammer** is another gathering tool for breaking rocks and mining minerals/ore.

> 🏆 **Achievement: I'm Crushing It!** — Created the Hammer.

**With the Hammer you can:**
- Break large rocks in the field
- Mine ore veins for metals and gems
- Access hidden caves and blocked passages

## Crafting the Bug Net

<!-- checkpoint: bug-net-crafted | Bug Net Crafted -->

The **Bug Net** lets you catch insects and small creatures.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Bug Catcher** — Created the Bug Net.

**With the Bug Net:**
- Catch butterflies, beetles, and other insects
- Some insects are rare and only appear in specific weather/time
- Insects are used in alchemy recipes for medicines and bombs

## Requests & Side Content

With the hideout built, **Requests** become available on the bulletin board. These are optional side quests from villagers that reward:
- Cole (currency)
- Recipe ideas (some unlock new recipes)
- Character events
- Rare materials

> Complete requests regularly! Some are time-limited to specific story chapters. Check the bulletin board frequently.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Popular Islander** — Completed requests to get Peter to interview you. Peter's interview triggers after completing a certain number of requests.

steps.text: Gather wood and building materials for the hideout renovation.
Synthesize the items Empel requests (Neutralizers, construction materials).
Complete all dialogue events with party members to trigger the hideout construction cutscene.
Synthesize the **Woodcutter's Axe** (requires metal ingots + wood + binding).
Return to Boden District and Windswept Plains to access new gathering points with the Axe.
steps.note: Chop down trees blocking paths for new areas and materials.

steps.text: Synthesize the **Fishing Rod** and try fishing at nearby spots.
Synthesize the **Hammer** to mine rocks and access ore veins.
Synthesize the **Bug Net** to catch insects for alchemy ingredients.
Check the bulletin board in the hideout for available requests and complete as many as possible.
steps.note: Some requests are chapter-limited. Complete them before advancing the story.

steps.text: ⚠️ Some requests expire when the story advances. Always clear the bulletin board before progressing major story events.
🏆 **Achievement: Popular Islander** — Complete enough requests to trigger Peter's interview event. Work on this throughout the game.

sections.title: Chapter 3: Deeper Mainland Exploration
sections.content:
# Chapter 3: Deeper Mainland Exploration

With all gathering tools in hand, you can now fully explore the mainland. The story pushes you deeper into dangerous territory as the mystery of the Underworld begins to unfold.

## Power Reactor Installation

<!-- checkpoint: power-reactor-installed | Power Reactor Installed -->

Empel teaches you about **Power Reactors** — devices that enhance your hideout's capabilities. Your first reactor enables **weapon and armor forging**.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Weapon Forger** — Installed a Power Reactor at the secret hideout.

**Forging System:**
- Use refined materials to create weapons and armor for each party member
- Higher quality synthesis materials = better stats
- Each party member has unique weapon types (Ryza uses a staff, Lent uses a mace, etc.)
- Traits transfer from synthesis materials into equipment

> ⚠️ **Important:** Craft the best equipment you can before proceeding to the Castle Ruins. Enemy difficulty spikes significantly.

## Fairy Forest & Surrounding Areas

<!-- checkpoint: explore-pixie-forest | Explore Fairy Forest -->

The **Fairy Forest** is an ethereal woodland with rare materials and moderately tough enemies.

**Key materials to gather:**
- **Fairy Dew** — rare, used in high-level healing recipes
- **Rainbow Ore** — needed for advanced equipment
- **Spirit Vine** — high-element plant material

**Enemies:**
- Wild Boars — high HP, physical attacks
- Phantom Knights — magic attacks, weak to fire
- Plant creatures — can inflict status ailments

## Castle Ruins — The Dragon

<!-- checkpoint: castle-dragon-defeated | Castle Dragon Defeated -->

The **Old Castle Ruins** are a multi-floor dungeon with strong enemies culminating in a dragon boss fight.

**Preparation Checklist:**
- Craft plenty of healing items (Healing Bells, Medica)
- Equip fire-resistant accessories if available
- Craft Bomb items for damage (Craft Bombs or Uni Bag)
- Ensure all party members have upgraded equipment

**Dragon Boss Fight:**
- **Castle Dragon** — large fire-breathing dragon
- **HP:** High (depends on difficulty)
- **Weakness:** Ice-element attacks
- **Attacks:** Fire breath (AOE), tail swipe, charge
- **Strategy:**
  - Keep Tactics Level high for stronger allied follow-ups
  - Use ice-element items (Icy Bomb, etc.) for bonus damage
  - Heal immediately after fire breath AOE hits
  - Use Orders when prompted to build Quick Actions
  - Don't hesitate to use Ryza's items aggressively — this is a major story boss

> 🏆 **Achievement: Castle Dragon** — Defeated the dragon at the old castle. Unmissable story progression.

## The History of Kurken Island

<!-- checkpoint: learn-history | Learn Island History -->

After the dragon, story events reveal more about the island's past and the growing darkness threatening it. Cutscenes with Empel provide crucial lore:

- The island was artificially created using ancient alchemy
- A disaster sealed away something dangerous beneath it
- The "Underworld" is connected to this history

> 🏆 **Achievement: A Stupid Argument** — Learned about the history of Ryza and the others. Triggers during story events in this chapter.

## Gathering Synthesizer Installation

<!-- checkpoint: gathering-synthesizer | Gathering Synthesizer Installed -->

You unlock the **Gathering Synthesizer** at the hideout — a device that lets you create custom gathering items (seeds, lures, supplements) to find rare materials in the field.

> 🏆 **Achievement: It's a Small World** — Installed the Gathering Synthesizer at the secret hideout.

**How it works:**
- Combine base materials to create "bottles" (gathering consumables)
- Higher level bottles find rarer materials
- The Synthesizer has its own level that increases with use
- At **Level 51**, you unlock the best possible bottles

> 🏆 **Achievement: World Creator** — Created a bottle with Gathering Synthesizer Level 51. This is a long-term goal — level it up throughout the game.

**TIP:** Use the Gathering Synthesizer frequently between story events. The rare materials it produces are essential for late-game equipment and items.

steps.text: Install the first Power Reactor at the hideout to unlock weapon/armor forging.
Forge new weapons and armor for all party members using high-quality synthesized materials.
steps.note: Prioritize Ryza's weapon and everyone's armor — the Castle Ruins are tough.

steps.text: Explore the Fairy Forest completely. Gather Fairy Dew, Rainbow Ore, and Spirit Vine.
⚠️ The Castle Ruins have a major difficulty spike. Craft Healing Bells, Bombs, and upgrade all equipment before entering.
Navigate the Castle Ruins dungeon. Collect all treasure chests on each floor.
**Boss: Castle Dragon** — Use ice-element items, keep Tactics Level high, heal after AOE fire breath.
steps.note: Weakness: Ice. Keep HP above 60% at all times due to fire breath damage.

steps.text: Watch the story cutscenes about Kurken Island's history and the Underworld.
Install the Gathering Synthesizer at the hideout. Begin using it to create gathering bottles.
steps.note: Level it up regularly — Level 51 is needed for the World Creator achievement.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: Secret Treasure** — Find one treasure chest. You'll get this naturally during Castle Ruins exploration.

sections.title: Chapter 4: The Underworld
sections.content:
# Chapter 4: The Underworld

The story takes a dramatic turn as Ryza and friends discover a passage to the **Underworld** — a vast, ancient realm beneath Kurken Island. This is one of the game's largest exploration areas with unique materials, powerful enemies, and critical story revelations.

## Discovering the Underworld Entrance

<!-- checkpoint: enter-underworld | Enter the Underworld -->

Following clues from the Castle Ruins and Empel's research, the group locates an entrance to the Underworld. The discovery triggers significant story events about the island's origins.

> 🏆 **Achievement: A Lost World** — Laid eyes on the Underworld. Unmissable story progression.

**Preparation Before Entering:**
- Stock up on healing items (Healing Bells, Medica, resurrect items)
- Craft the best Bombs you can (Craft Bomb, Flame Rod)
- Upgrade all equipment at the Power Reactor
- Bring varied gathering tools — new material types are abundant

## Underworld Exploration

<!-- checkpoint: underworld-exploration | Explore the Underworld -->

The Underworld is divided into several zones, each with unique environments:

**Zones:**
1. **Crystal Caverns** — ice-element materials, crystal monsters
2. **Ancient Ruins** — mechanical enemies, ancient recipe hints
3. **Fungal Garden** — rare plants, poisonous enemies
4. **Magma Corridor** — fire materials, extreme enemy strength
5. **Central Chamber** — story progression area

**Unique Materials in the Underworld:**
- **Ancient Ore** — high-tier metal for the best weapons
- **Glowing Moss** — rare alchemy ingredient
- **Crystal Fragment** — needed for advanced recipes
- **Abyssal Water** — unique liquid material
- **Fossil** — rare ingredient for specific recipes

**Enemies (significantly tougher than surface):**
- Crystal Golems — high DEF, weak to fire
- Shadow Wolves — fast, high damage
- Ancient Guardians — magic attacks, can buff allies
- Toxic Mushroom monsters — inflict multiple status ailments

## Overnight Camping

<!-- checkpoint: camp-underworld | Camp in the Underworld -->

At a designated rest point, the party camps overnight in the Underworld. This triggers character events and story dialogue.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Overnight Campout** — Spent the night camping in the Underworld.

During the camping scene:
- Character bonding events with each party member
- Empel reveals more about his past and connection to alchemy
- The group discusses their findings and next objectives

## Empel's Past & Power Restoration

<!-- checkpoint: empel-restored | Empel's Power Restored -->

Deeper in the Underworld, you discover connections to Empel's past. A specific quest chain helps Empel regain his former alchemical strength.

> 🏆 **Achievement: A New Hand** — Helped Empel regain his former strength.

**Requirements:**
- Find specific ancient alchemy materials in the Underworld
- Synthesize a key restoration item
- Complete Empel's character event chain

After this, Empel teaches Ryza advanced synthesis techniques that unlock more powerful recipes.

## Multiplicauldron Installation

<!-- checkpoint: multiplicauldron | Multiplicauldron Installed -->

With advanced techniques learned, you can now install the **Multiplicauldron** at the hideout — a device that duplicates items.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Item Cloner** — Installed the Multiplicauldron at the secret hideout.

**Multiplicauldron Benefits:**
- Duplicate healing items, bombs, and other consumables
- No longer need to re-synthesize items from scratch
- Essential for keeping your battle supply stocked

> 📝 **TIP:** Duplicate your best Bombs and healing items. Having a large stock makes boss fights much more manageable.

## Bomb Rod Recipe

<!-- checkpoint: bomb-rod-crafted | Bomb Rod Crafted -->

During this chapter you unlock the **Bomb Rod** recipe — one of the most powerful offensive items in the game.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Detonate and Decimate!** — Created the Bomb Rod.

**Bomb Rod Notes:**
- High fire damage to all enemies
- Can be further enhanced with traits for massive damage
- Core combat item for the remainder of the game
- Duplicate with the Multiplicauldron to keep stocked

steps.text: ⚠️ The Underworld is a significant difficulty step-up. Fully upgrade equipment, stock healing items and bombs before entering.
Follow the story to discover the Underworld entrance beneath the island.
Explore the Crystal Caverns zone. Gather Ancient Ore and Crystal Fragments.
Navigate the Ancient Ruins zone. Watch for mechanical enemy ambushes.
Clear the Fungal Garden. Gather rare plants (be wary of poison enemies).
Rest at the camping spot to trigger the overnight cutscene and character bonding events.
Complete Empel's character quest: find ancient materials, synthesize restoration item.
steps.note: This unlocks advanced alchemy techniques and new recipes.

steps.text: Return to the hideout and install the **Multiplicauldron** for item duplication.
Synthesize the **Bomb Rod** — your most powerful offensive item.
steps.note: Use the Multiplicauldron to duplicate it immediately.

steps.text: Collect all unique Underworld materials: Ancient Ore, Glowing Moss, Crystal Fragment, Abyssal Water, Fossil.
steps.note: These are needed for late-game recipes and equipment.

steps.text: 🏆 **Achievement: Treasure Hunter** — Find ALL treasure chests in the game. The Underworld has many hidden chests — explore every dead end and side path.

sections.title: Chapter 5: The Holy Tower of Pynnor
sections.content:
# Chapter 5: The Holy Tower of Pynnor

The story leads to the **Holy Tower of Pynnor** — an ancient structure holding the truth about Kurken Island's creation, the Underworld, and the darkness threatening everything.

## Reaching the Tower

<!-- checkpoint: reach-tower | Reach the Tower of Pynnor -->

Access to the Tower requires completing specific story triggers in the Underworld. Once available, travel to the tower entrance in the upper Underworld area.

**Preparation:**
- Bring your absolute best equipment
- Stock Bomb Rods (duplicated), Healing Bells, Revive items
- Ensure party members are around level 35-40
- Have ice and fire element items for different enemy types

## Tower Dungeon

<!-- checkpoint: tower-midpoint | Tower of Pynnor Midpoint -->

The Tower is a multi-floor dungeon with increasingly powerful enemies and puzzles.

**Floor Layout:**
- **Floors 1-3:** Moderate enemies, introduction to tower mechanics
- **Floors 4-6:** Stronger enemies, environmental puzzles (activate switches to open paths)
- **Floors 7-9:** Elite enemies, rare gathering points
- **Top Floor:** Boss encounter and story revelations

**Key Enemies:**
- Tower Guardians — high HP, magical shields (break with physical attacks)
- Specters — fast magic users, weak to light-element items
- Armored Knights — very high DEF, must use armor-piercing attacks/items

**Treasure to Find:**
- Ancient recipe pages (unlock late-game recipes)
- High-tier materials unique to the tower
- Accessory blueprints

## The Truth Revealed

<!-- checkpoint: truth-revealed | Learn the Truth at the Tower -->

At the top of the Tower, major story revelations occur:
- The full history of the island's creation through alchemy
- The nature of the darkness/corruption spreading underground
- What must be done to save the island
- Empel's complete backstory and connection to the ancient alchemists

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Abandoned Tower** — Visited the Holy Tower of Pynnor and learned the truth. Unmissable story progression.

## Post-Tower: Preparing for the Endgame

After the Tower revelations, the story accelerates toward the final confrontation. You now have:
- Knowledge of what the **Crimson Stone** is and why it's needed
- Access to late-game recipes
- Clear objectives for the remaining story

> 📝 **SAVE POINT:** Create a separate save here. The game becomes more linear after this point, though all content remains accessible post-game. If you want to complete side content efficiently, do it NOW.

**Side content to finish before proceeding:**
- All available requests on the bulletin board
- Gathering Synthesizer leveling (aim for Level 51)
- Treasure chest hunting in all accessible areas
- Character events (talk to all party members at the hideout)
- Fishing at all discovered spots
- Level grinding if under level 40

checkpoints.label: Learn the Truth at the Tower

steps.text: ⚠️ The Tower of Pynnor is one of the hardest dungeons. Stock Bomb Rods, Healing Bells, and ensure party is level 35-40+.
Access the Tower of Pynnor from the upper Underworld area.
Clear floors 1-3. Watch for hidden treasure chests in side paths.
Navigate floors 4-6 (solve switch puzzles to open paths). Defeat Tower Guardians.
steps.note: Break magical shields with physical Crafts before switching to items for damage.

steps.text: Clear floors 7-9 (elite enemies). Gather rare tower-exclusive materials.
Watch the story revelations at the tower summit about the island's true history.

⚠️ **SAVE BEFORE PROCEEDING.** While everything CAN be completed post-game, it's more efficient to clear side content now (requests, gathering synthesizer leveling, treasure hunting, character events) before the final story chapters.
Complete all available requests, character events, and side exploration before proceeding.
steps.note: Check: Requests cleared? Gathering Synthesizer leveled? All accessible chests found? All fishing spots visited?

steps.text: Collect ancient recipe pages in the Tower — these unlock critical late-game synthesis recipes.

sections.title: Chapter 6: The Kurken Bunker
sections.content:
# Chapter 6: The Kurken Bunker

Armed with the truth from the Tower of Pynnor, the group descends into the deepest part of the island's underground — the **Kurken Bunker**, an ancient facility where the island's power source and the encroaching darkness originate.

## Entering the Bunker

<!-- checkpoint: enter-bunker | Enter the Kurken Bunker -->

The Bunker entrance is revealed after the Tower of Pynnor events. This is a man-made ancient structure completely different from the natural Underworld caves.

> 🏆 **Achievement: A Manmade Island** — Entered the Kurken Bunker. Unmissable story progression.

**Bunker Features:**
- Ancient mechanical traps and puzzles
- Extremely powerful enemies (level 40+ recommended)
- Multiple floors descending deeper
- Unique high-tier gathering materials
- No save points inside (save before entering!)

## Boss: Queen of Darkness

<!-- checkpoint: queen-of-darkness-defeated | Queen of Darkness Defeated -->

Deep within the Bunker, you face the **Queen of Darkness** — the source of the corruption threatening the island.

**Queen of Darkness:**
- **HP:** Very High
- **Weakness:** Light-element items
- **Attacks:** 
  - Shadow Wave (AOE darkness damage)
  - Curse Touch (single target, high damage + DEF down)
  - Dark Summon (creates shadow minions)
  - Void Pulse (party-wide, can KO weaker members)
- **Strategy:**
  - Priority: eliminate summoned minions quickly before they overwhelm you
  - Use light-element items (if available) for bonus damage
  - Keep HP above 70% — Void Pulse comes without warning
  - Build Tactics Level quickly for strong allied support
  - Use all your duplicated Bomb Rods aggressively
  - Apply buffs (ATK/DEF up) at the start of the fight

> 🏆 **Achievement: Queen of Darkness** — Defeated the Queen of Darkness. Unmissable story boss.

## The Crimson Stone

<!-- checkpoint: crimson-stone | Create the Crimson Stone -->

After defeating the Queen, the true endgame objective becomes clear: you must synthesize the **Crimson Stone** — an ancient alchemical creation that will purify the island and seal the darkness permanently.

**Crimson Stone Requirements:**
- Rare materials from the Underworld, Tower, and Bunker
- Multiple intermediate synthesis steps (chain recipe)
- Very high alchemy skill required
- This is the ultimate synthesis challenge of the game

> 🏆 **Achievement: An Island Reborn** — Created the Crimson Stone and saved Kurken Island. This is the game's final story achievement.

## Using the Crimson Stone

Once crafted, events trigger the final story sequence:
- The party descends to the island's core
- The Crimson Stone is activated
- The darkness is sealed
- Epilogue scenes play showing the aftermath

> 🏆 **Achievement: Beyond the Present** — Saw everyone move on to chase their dreams. Final credits scene achievement.

steps.text: ⚠️ **SAVE BEFORE ENTERING THE BUNKER.** There are limited save points inside. Bring your best items.
Enter the Kurken Bunker through the newly revealed passage.
Solve the ancient mechanical puzzles and traps while descending through the floors.
Collect unique Bunker materials — needed for the Crimson Stone synthesis chain.
**Boss: Queen of Darkness** — Eliminate summons first, use light-element items, keep HP above 70% for Void Pulse.
steps.note: Burn through your Bomb Rod stock aggressively. This is the hardest mandatory boss.

steps.text: Synthesize all intermediate materials for the **Crimson Stone** recipe chain.
steps.note: Multiple sub-recipes feed into this. Check recipe tree carefully.

steps.text: Create the **Crimson Stone** — the game's ultimate synthesis.
steps.note: Requires high alchemy level and best-quality materials from all areas.

steps.text: Proceed to the island's core and activate the Crimson Stone to complete the main story.
Watch the epilogue scenes showing each character's future path.
🏆 **Achievement: True Firepower!** — Find and install ALL Power Reactors. Make sure you've found all reactor locations before finishing the game (check Underworld and Bunker for hidden ones).

sections.title: Post-Game: Optional Bosses & Completion
sections.content:
# Post-Game: Optional Bosses & Completion

After completing the main story, the game continues with access to all areas. This is the time to fight optional bosses, complete all achievements, and reach 100% completion.

## Optional Super Bosses

<!-- checkpoint: post-game-start | Post-Game Begins -->

Atelier Ryza features several powerful optional bosses scattered across the world. These require top-tier synthesized equipment and items.

### Shining Puni

<!-- checkpoint: shining-puni-defeated | Shining Puni Defeated -->

The **Shining Puni** (also called Godly Puni) is a secret boss — a golden version of the basic Puni enemy with absurdly high stats.

- **Location:** Hidden area accessible after main story
- **HP:** Extremely High
- **Attacks:** Enhanced versions of basic Puni moves, plus unique AOE
- **Strategy:** Max-quality Bomb Rods, best equipment, full buffs before engaging

> 🏆 **Achievement: Godly Puni** — Defeated the Shining Puni.

### Noble Paladin

<!-- checkpoint: noble-paladin-defeated | Noble Paladin Defeated -->

A powerful armored knight-type boss found in a secret area.

- **Location:** Hidden room in the Underworld Ancient Ruins
- **Strategy:** Requires armor-piercing items and high damage output

> 🏆 **Achievement: Fallen Champion** — Defeated the Noble Paladin.

### Savage Assassin

<!-- checkpoint: savage-assassin-defeated | Savage Assassin Defeated -->

A speed-focused boss that hits extremely hard.

- **Location:** Accessible in a hidden valley area
- **Strategy:** Prioritize DEF buffs and healing; its damage output is enormous

> 🏆 **Achievement: Fierce Valley King** — Defeated the Savage Assassin.

### Mirage Master

<!-- checkpoint: mirage-master-defeated | Mirage Master Defeated -->

A magic-focused boss at the Tower of Pynnor (secret floor).

- **Location:** Hidden floor in the Tower of Pynnor (accessible after main story)
- **Strategy:** Magic resistance equipment, interrupt its charged attacks

> 🏆 **Achievement: Holy Tower Sentinel** — Defeated the Mirage Master.

### King of Storms

<!-- checkpoint: king-of-storms-defeated | King of Storms Defeated -->

An elemental boss with devastating wind/lightning attacks.

- **Location:** High-altitude area accessible post-game
- **Strategy:** Lightning resistance, ground-element items for weakness exploitation

> 🏆 **Achievement: Rainmaker** — Defeated the King of Storms.

### Eternal Sculpture

<!-- checkpoint: eternal-sculpture-defeated | Eternal Sculpture Defeated -->

A colossal golem-type boss — one of the hardest in the game.

- **Location:** Deepest part of the Kurken Bunker (post-game extension)
- **Strategy:** Extremely long fight; bring maximum item supply, prioritize sustained damage

> 🏆 **Achievement: Legendary Giant** — Defeated the Eternal Sculpture.

### Queen of Shadows (True Form)

<!-- checkpoint: queen-of-shadows-defeated | Queen of Shadows Defeated -->

The **Queen of Shadows** is the enhanced version of the Queen of Darkness — the game's true superboss.

- **Location:** Returns to the Bunker depths post-game with enhanced power
- **HP:** The highest in the game
- **Strategy:** Requires Item Level 99 equipment, max alchemy, perfect builds

> 🏆 **Achievement: True Queen of Shadows** — Defeated the Queen of Shadows.

### The 5 Great Elements

<!-- checkpoint: elemental-slayer | All Great Elements Defeated -->

Five elemental bosses scattered across different areas (one per element: Fire, Ice, Lightning, Wind, Earth).

> 🏆 **Achievement: Elemental Slayer** — Defeated all 5 Great Elements. You must find and defeat each one.

## Completion Checklist

<!-- checkpoint: completion-goals | Working on 100% Completion -->

### Alchemy Level 99

Synthesize repeatedly to level up. Focus on complex multi-step recipes for maximum XP.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Total Mastery** — Got Ryza's alchemy level to 99.

### Battle Level 50

Grind battles against post-game enemies for EXP.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Musclebound Alchemist** — Got Ryza's battle level to 50.

### All Recipes

Obtain every recipe in the game through story progression, requests, and synthesis discovery (morphing).

> 🏆 **Achievement: Alchemy Master** — Obtained all recipes.

### Item Level 99

Create an item with the maximum Item Level through perfect synthesis chains and high-quality materials.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Ultra Alchemy** — Created an item with Item Level 99.

### All Treasure Chests

Find every treasure chest in every area of the game.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Treasure Hunter** — Found all treasure chests.

### All Exploration Records

Complete exploration records for every area by discovering all gathering points and defeating all unique enemies.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Our Adventure Memory** — Wrote a record of every exploration.

### Revelation Book

Obtain the secret ultimate recipe book.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Lost Alchemy Tome** — Obtained the Revelation Book.

### All Fatal Drives

Activate every party member's ultimate attack (Fatal Drive) at least once.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Fully Fatal Drive** — Activated everyone's Fatal Drive.

### Become a Braver

Complete the Braver rank quest chain.

> 🏆 **Achievement: The Courageous One** — Became a Braver.

### Rasen Pudding

Help create the island's specialty dish through a specific request chain.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Island Specialty** — Helped create Rasen Pudding.

### Save the Goat

Complete the side quest to save a wandering goat you encounter during your travels.

> 🏆 **Achievement: Furry White Wanderer** — Saved the goat you met on your travels.

### Gathering Synthesizer Level 51

Continue using the Gathering Synthesizer until it reaches max level.

> 🏆 **Achievement: World Creator** — Created a bottle with Gathering Synthesizer Level 51.

steps.text: Synthesize the best possible weapons, armor, and accessories using Item Level 99 materials.
steps.note: Focus on traits: high ATK, elemental damage, HP recovery. Use Gems for trait transfer.

steps.text: Use the Multiplicauldron to duplicate your best Bomb Rods, healing items, and buff items.
**Optional Boss: Shining Puni** — Found in a hidden area post-game. Deceptively powerful for a Puni.
steps.note: Requires max-tier equipment to defeat reliably.

steps.text: **Optional Boss: Noble Paladin** — Hidden in Underworld Ancient Ruins. Use armor-piercing items.
**Optional Boss: Savage Assassin** — In a hidden valley. Stack DEF buffs to survive its attacks.
**Optional Boss: Mirage Master** — Secret floor of Tower of Pynnor. Bring magic resistance gear.
**Optional Boss: King of Storms** — Post-game high area. Equip lightning resistance.
**Optional Boss: Eternal Sculpture** — Deepest Bunker. Very long fight — maximize item stock.
**Optional Boss: Queen of Shadows** — The true superboss. Requires perfect Item Level 99 builds.
steps.note: This is the hardest fight in the game. Bring everything.

steps.text: Find and defeat all 5 Great Elements (Fire, Ice, Lightning, Wind, Earth) across the world.
Raise Ryza's alchemy level to 99 through repeated high-level synthesis.
Raise Ryza's battle level to 50 by fighting post-game enemies.
Obtain every recipe through story, requests, and synthesis morphing.
steps.note: Recipe morphing: use specific materials during synthesis to discover variant recipes.

steps.text: Create an item with Item Level 99 through perfect synthesis chains.
Find every treasure chest in all areas of the game (use area maps for tracking).
Complete all exploration records by discovering every area's gather points and unique enemies.
Obtain the Revelation Book (ultimate recipe compendium) from post-game content.
Activate every party member's Fatal Drive at least once in combat.
steps.note: Fatal Drive requires max Tactics Level and full AP. Build up both before triggering.

steps.text: Complete the Braver rank quest chain to earn the Braver title.
Complete the request chain to help create Rasen Pudding (island specialty dish).
Find and complete the side quest to save the wandering white goat.
Level the Gathering Synthesizer to 51 by repeatedly crafting gathering bottles.
🏆 **Achievement: Atelier Ryza** — Earn all other trophies/achievements to unlock the platinum. No single achievement is missable — everything can be completed post-game.
